title: Fix UI: Add-Server full-page route + channel list fix + E2E verify
description:
Three issues to fix:
1. 'Add Server' must be a full-page route (like Settings) with FavoritesBar + AccountServerBar on left, not an inline dialog
2. Fix: #general channel not appearing in left channel list when viewing E2E test server
3. E2E verify: Start poly-server, signup, create server, create channel, send message — all via poly-web screenshots

checklist.text: Explore: find add-server dialog trigger and channel list rendering for poly servers
Move 'Add Server' to a full-page Route with FavoritesBar + AccountServerBar visible on left
Fix channel list: #general not showing in left sidebar for poly-server account servers
cargo cranky --workspace zero warnings after all code changes
Start poly-server + poly-web, do signup E2E flow via screenshots
Visual verify: Add-Server page renders with both bars on left (screenshot)
Visual verify: channel list shows #general for E2E test server (screenshot)
Visual verify: create server, create channel, send message in #general (screenshot)
